title: oxystophyllum araneum
intro: Oxystophyllum araneum, also known as the Spider Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxystophyllum araneum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Oxystophyllum araneum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
